dict.string: GeoAlarm uses alarms so it can wake you with a sound and a lock-screen alert when you reach your stop — even in silent mode or Focus.

GeoNap can scan your calendars for upcoming trips (flights, trains, meetings with a location) so it can suggest location-based alarms for them. This is off by default and only runs if you turn it on in Settings → Calendar Scanning.
GeoNap can scan your calendars for upcoming trips so it can suggest location-based alarms for them. This is off by default and only runs if you turn it on in Settings → Calendar Scanning.
